summary: Phase 2.5-review-f (#261) smoke checklist: PRD.md and summary.md document smoke commands; smoke-checklist-runbook.md provides HITL sign-off covering DNS, TLS, frontend, /health, OAuth callback, reviewer login, CORS, and review-only confirmation; smoke-test.sh extended with CORS preflight probe; 14 new contract tests pass with 69 phase-2.5 deploy tests green.

mappings.criterion: Checklist covers DNS, TLS, frontend load, /health, OAuth callback, reviewer login.
Checklist explicitly confirms no production users, traffic, or persistent business data.
Commands documented in PRD.md and summary.md.

recommendations: Operator must run APP_DOMAIN=app-juli.com API_DOMAIN=api.app-juli.com ./infra/deploy/smoke-test.sh on live VPS before closing #261.
Copy operator sign-off record from smoke-checklist-runbook.md to ops notes.
